environment_prompt: An indoor anime-style room with a wooden table in the foreground. On the table sits a large transparent glass containing a small amount of red liquid at the bottom. Behind the table is a cozy room interior with a bed on the left, a window, and shelving or cabinets in pastel tones on the right. The scene uses flat cel-shaded rendering with simplified shapes, clean edges, and solid colors. On the far side of the table, a boy stands holding a plastic bottle filled with green liquid, cap still sealed. Additional kitchen items such as a small towel and a plate rest on the table surface just outside the initial frame.
perspective_prompt: First-person point of view at table height, looking straight ahead across the tabletop toward the standing figure on the opposite side. No visible character body; the camera acts as the viewer's eyes.

interactions.action: The boy twists open the cap of a plastic bottle.
The boy pours the liquid into a glass bottle.
